# API Reference

## Endpoints

- **Storage API**: https://api.0g.ai/storage
- **Indexer API**: https://api.0g.ai/indexer

## Authentication

All endpoints require a Bearer token.

See [GitHub repo](https://github.com/0gfoundation/0g-ts-sdk) for SDK source code.
See [npm package](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@0gfoundation/0g-ts-sdk) for releases.
